folio.label: 51r
folio.l: Lo slike a complyngö , is ymeÂ hem alle

note.notetxt: 251Ink is lighter only in this line.ODR

folio.l: A wylde fyr , on theire bodies falle
Wha herd euäe , slike a ferly thyngö
ñe they sal haue , the flour of euele endyngö
This langö nygút , ne tydes me na rest
But ©et na force , al sal be for the best
For Ioún seide he , as euäe mot I thryue
If æat I may , ©one lasse wol I swyue
Som easement , has lawe shapen vs
For Ioún there is a lawe , that seith thus
That gyf a man , in a poynt be greued
That in a nother , he shal bereleued
Oure cornö is stolen , sothly it is na nay
And we han had , an ylle fyt this day
And syn I sal haue , nan amendement
Agayn my losse , I wyl haue an easement
By goddes saule , it sal nan other be
¢ This Ioún answered , Aleyn a vyse the
The Millere is a ¹lious man , he seide
And gyf that he , ou©t of his slepe breyde
He mygút do vs bathe , a velanye
Aleyn answered , I counte hi~ nat a flye
Vp he rist , and by the wenche he crepte
This wenche lay vp rigút , & faste slepte
Til he so ny was , er she mygút a spye
That it had ben to late , for to crye
And shortly for to seyn , they were at on
Now pley Aleyn , for I wyl speke of Ioún
¢ This Ioún lith stille , aa forlong wey or twoa284 Double check this correction. It is a secretary form of a.ODR
And to hi~ self , he maketh reuthe and woo
Allas q¶ he , this is , a wykked Iape
Now may I sey , that I is but an Ape
ñet has my felawe , somwhat for his harm
He has the Milleres dougúter , in his arm

note.notetxt: dougúter284 there is a pause in the text. I think it is a change in the pen, the ink seems lighter, but i think it depends on the pen. The shade is the same.ODR

folio.l: He auntred hi~ , and has his nedes spedde
And I ly as a drafsakke , in my bedde
And whan this iape , is tald another day
I sal behalden a daffe , a Cokenay
I wyl aryse , and auntre it be my feitú
Vnhardy , is vnsely , thus men seitú
And vp he roos , and softly he went
Vn to the cradel , and in his hand it hent
And bar it softe , vn to his beddes fete
¢ Sone after this , the wyf hire routyngö lete
And gan a wake , and went hire ou©t to pisse
And cam a geyn , and gan hire cradel mysse
